strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from backend services to user-facing UIs and DevOps tooling
Strong open-source contributions and knowledge-sharing culture, including workshops and tool development
concerns: Job titles (e.g., Staff/Senior) suggest senior-level experience, conflicting with entry-level role expectations
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to the required tech stack
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures, with strong evidence of ownership across complex systems and a passion for clean code — yet his senior-level track record and limited German proficiency raise questions about fit for an entry-level, on-site role in Berlin.
